special_mechanics.name: character_switching
special_mechanics.description: Player controls three IMF operatives (Max, Grant, Nicholas) with different skills, switchable at any time during gameplay

special_mechanics.name: discretion_system
special_mechanics.description: Top-down action-adventure gameplay emphasizes stealth and avoiding detection by surveillance systems and security guards

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Available sources contain no specific physics parameters, jump heights, acceleration values, gravity constants, or sub-pixel system documentation. Sources focus on gameplay mechanics, regional differences (damage values only), and development metadata. No ROM analysis or precise movement parameters documented.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Mission: Impossible (NES)
